message:
feat: apply error wrapping to remaining bare returns in dolt storage (bd-bwk2)

Continue centralizing error handling across all dolt storage files:
- issues.go: wrap insertIssue, recordEvent, tx.Commit returns
- wisps.go: wrap 25 bare returns (queries, scans, tx commits)
- ephemeral_routing.go: wrap promote operations
- credentials.go: wrap updatePeerLastSync
- versioned.go: wrap history and conflicts queries
- labels.go: wrap rows.Err and GetIssue returns
- federation.go: wrap setLastSyncTime
- issue_scan.go: wrap scanIssueFrom scan error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
